option.name: originalContent
option.value: [submodule "backend"] path = backend url = ./playground/backend [submodule "frontend"] path = frontend url = ./playground/frontend

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: [submodule "backend"] path = backend url = https://github.com/Jaringvm/backend [submodule "frontend"] path = frontend url = https://github.com/Jaringvm/frontend
